name: Arctic Fleet
short_description: The Arctic doesn’t forgive your mistakes. You need to come up with a good strategy to make the business successful. It sounds hard; however, it is not that easy to scary you, and you accept the challenge, don’t you?
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Arctic Region!



The North attracts you since childhood. You have been ranging arctic seas for few years. After your father’s death you’ve inherited a couple of icebreakers and now you have an opportunity to make your dream come true — create your own polar fleet and continue the family business.



As a first step, you’ve carefully examined all types of modern icebreakers. Each icebreaker has the following characteristics: deadweight, power and specialty. Icebreaking capability, performed contracts, required amount of money for construction and maintenance depend on these characteristics.



Choose where you place your ships, which contracts are more profitable.

Remember, the Arctic doesn’t forgive your mistakes. You need to come up with a good strategy to make the business successful. It sounds hard; however, it is not that easy to scary you, and you accept the challenge, don’t you?
about_the_game:
Welcome to the Arctic Region!



The North attracts you since childhood. You have been ranging arctic seas for few years. After your father’s death you’ve inherited a couple of icebreakers and now you have an opportunity to make your dream come true — create your own polar fleet and continue the family business.



As a first step, you’ve carefully examined all types of modern icebreakers. Each icebreaker has the following characteristics: deadweight, power and specialty. Icebreaking capability, performed contracts, required amount of money for construction and maintenance depend on these characteristics.



Choose where you place your ships, which contracts are more profitable.

Remember, the Arctic doesn’t forgive your mistakes. You need to come up with a good strategy to make the business successful. It sounds hard; however, it is not that easy to scary you, and you accept the challenge, don’t you?
